canonical_definition: A benchmark comprising 6,984 poem-explanation pairs across 12 historical eras and 14 genres of Arabic poetry, designed to evaluate semantic, metaphorical, prosodic, and cultural understanding through QA-style tasks.
papers: MobiZO: Enabling EfficientLLMFine-Tuning at the Edge via Inference Engines

definitions.text: A benchmark comprising 6,984 poem-explanation pairs across 12 historical eras and 14 genres of Arabic poetry, designed to evaluate semantic, metaphorical, prosodic, and cultural understanding through QA-style tasks.
definitions.paper: MobiZO: Enabling EfficientLLMFine-Tuning at the Edge via Inference Engines

relationships.paper: MobiZO: Enabling EfficientLLMFine-Tuning at the Edge via Inference Engines
relationships.evidence: In this work, we introduce Fann or Flop, the first benchmark designed to assess the comprehension of Arabic poetry by LLMs in 12 historical eras (Abstract).

emnlp25: MobiZO: Enabling EfficientLLMFine-Tuning at the Edge via Inference Engines

relationships.paper: MobiZO: Enabling EfficientLLMFine-Tuning at the Edge via Inference Engines
relationships.evidence: The benchmark comprises a curated corpus of poems with explanations that assess semantic understanding, metaphor interpretation, prosodic awareness, and cultural context (Abstract).
